creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Confirmed - it seemes to work for me, too. Only some cosmetics to the Makefile:

PORTREVISION schould be unset or 0, the trailing backslash on line 

BUILD_DEPENDS=  sphinx-build:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-sphinx \

should be erased - on my opinion.

Thanks for the fast answer and salvation of the problem.

Regards,
oh
